name: Turtle Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, beat flour, sugar, and butter on medium speed for 2-3 minutes.
2. Press the mixture firmly into an ungreased 9 x 13 baking pan.
3. Arrange pecans over the crust.
4. Combine butter and brown sugar in a heavy saucepan. Bring to a boil; boil for 1 minute, stirring constantly. Pour over pecans.
5. Bake at 350°F for 18-22 minutes or until bubbly.
6. Sprinkle chocolate chips on top; let stand for 3 minutes.
7. Spread the mixture and allow some chips to remain whole.
8. Cool completely before cutting into small squares.
